mnemonics: SWING: See What I Need Graphic-ally (to remember that Swing provides graphical components for building user interfaces)
keyPoints: Swing is a GUI widget toolkit for Java, built on top of AWT
Swing components are lightweight and platform-independent
commonMistakes: Not using Event Dispatch Thread (EDT) for UI updates, causing thread-safety issues
Forgetting to call setVisible(true) on the JFrame, making the window invisible
Mixing AWT and Swing components improperly, leading to rendering problems
